# Sprint 2.1 Buffer Analysis

**Project:** Transit Gap — Between-Stops Economy Analyzer
**Sprint:** Sprint 2. Spatial Analysis
**Objective:** Perform spatial analysis to identify the underutilized zones between transit stops.

## Description
Create 500-meter buffers around station centroids and merge overlapping buffers to create continuous corridors.

## Deliverable
Buffer analysis results
